# ADR-0001: First decision

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-05

## Context

A well-formed decision with no seeded violations: valid status, sequential numbering, matching index, no dangling links, no expired review-by, no governed-path conflicts.

## Decision

Use this as one half of the clean-baseline fixture — zero Tier 0 findings expected.

## Consequences

None — this is the negative control for the fixture corpus.
